history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person stands on an asphalt road at night, facing away from the camera. They are wearing a black hoodie with a white star graphic featuring an eye and text that reads "No Sleep Club." The hoodie also has blue accents and star designs on the sleeves and hood. The person has dark, spiky hair and is wearing a white t-shirt underneath the hoodie, along with dark shorts.

The background is a dimly lit street with trees lining the left side of the road. A sidewalk with a black and white striped curb runs alongside the trees. On the right side of the road, there are streetlights and some decorative bushes or small trees with colorful foliage. The overall lighting is dark, with artificial lights creating strong highlights and shadows, giving the scene a dramatic and slightly moody atmosphere. The color palette is dominated by dark blues, blacks, whites, and pops of color from the foliage. The style is urban and contemporary, with a focus on street fashion.
